messages.content: Hello! It's nice to meet you. How can I help you today?
can you check the readme file of the wrking directory ?

(RUN_CMD)
ls -la | grep -i readme; cat README* 2>/dev/null || echo "No README file found in current directory"

I'll check for any README files in the current working directory and display their contents if found.

[RUN_CMD]
find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -iname "*readme*" -exec cat {} \; || echo "No README files found in current directory"

$ find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -iname "*readme*" -exec cat {} \; || echo "No README files found in current directory"
[Command completed with no output]
